statement: ∀ n : Nat, fdouble n = n + n

proof: by intro n; induction n with | zero => simp [fdouble] | succ k ih => simp_all [fdouble, ih]

statement: ∀ n : Nat, gtwice n = n + n

by intro n; induction n with | zero => simp [dbl] | succ k ih => simp [dbl]; omega

def sumTo : Nat → Nat
  | 0 => 0
  | (n+1) => (n+1) + sumTo n

  | 0 => 0
  | (n+1) => dbl n + 2
